reviews.review_text: Budget accommodation, nice little cabins with what you need for a quiet break away. Lovely and friendly staff.

When we arrived in Hervey bay we hadn’t arranged accommodation yet for ourselves and our small dog, we had been rooftop camping for a couple of weeks and the team at both Fraser of the parks (Emily and Therese) helped us with a pet friendly cabin! We were so happy to have a comfortable cabin, lots of space and close to the esplanade with cafes and restaurants. Great service and location!

Well I ended up staying longer than I intended to and the staff were very accommodating, excuse the pun. The location was ideal for local attractions and having a camp out with the relatives and kids. From football night in the barbecue area to the floating salt water pool we had a good time. Keep up the good work with the clean amenities it was a pleasure. Thank you from Jerry and Millie

Hi
We are currently in the caravan park off Exitor st and can't complain, lovely polite lady's at reception and the cabin is  amazing, still have another 3 nights, but couldn't wait to put a review in, great pool and close to everything.
Thanks 👍 for everything.

Very outdated cabin, wasn’t cleaned very well as there were bits of dirt on the floor. The crockery was all stained from not being cleaned well, and the bathroom was run down. We also had an ant infestation which they would come out between 4-5pm but at this point the reception would either be closed early or ‘be back in 15 mins’ when it stated they close at 5pm. The pool looked nice but didn’t get to go in and the bed was fairly comfortable. Location was 20 minutes from the beach and the beaches were beautiful.

We had a fantastic stay :) We felt really looked after and the reception team where wonderful and accomodating :) Max went above and beyond for us and make sure we had a nice spot to park our caravan and it was nice and close to amenities. Many thanks.

I stayed here 6 months ago and was very impressed. Not so much this time. There was hair all over the shower walls, mould in the shower, food scraps between cushions of couch, dirty coffee cups in cupboard. Next time I will probably look for somewhere else to stay.
Good location. Nice and quiet. Easy access, boom gates.

We were really excited for our stay, but unfortunately, our experience was far from what we expected. We booked a cabin at this park for almost $200 a night, and it was an absolute disappointment.

Firstly, the cabin was difficult to find, with no clear signage, especially since we arrived after dark. When we finally parked, we were greeted by an awful sewage smell around the area.
There were no bathroom amenities in the cabin at all, being heavily pregnant this was not ideal and for the price per night . I tried to contact the park multiple times to express our concerns, but I never received any response from the staff.
Overall, this stay was a letdown, and unfortunately I would not recommend this stay.

Absolutely loved my stay here—everything was clean, peaceful, and well-maintained. The location was perfect, with easy access to local attractions and beautiful surroundings. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, making the whole experience feel like a home away from home. We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡♡♡

We stayed over the weekend and unfortunately didn’t have a great experience. The park was completely full, mostly with permanent residents. We were assigned the middle site in a very tight row and had a hard time backing our van in. The sites are tiny, with vans either side and across a narrow internal road. Reversing into our spot without hitting something felt nearly impossible.||There was also a dog belonging to one of the permanent residents behind us that barked constantly, which made it hard to relax.||This park might suit long-term stayers better, but it’s not ideal for short-term travellers towing a van. We won’t be back.
Would not recommend this park

We had a one night stay here and had to book last minute. Staff were so kind and made us feel so welcome.
Such a beautiful place and great facilities.
We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡

Great park,..not far from waterfront where all the action is located.
Facilities all good ,sites o.k,.just a little tight trying to park van. Staff excellent.
Stayed in a family cabin. Was very clean and tidy
Almost perfect. Only lack mirror inside the budget cabin. Other than that. Can’t complain. Nice stay. Would definitely comeback and recommend it to others.
Great service, clean rooms, comfortable beds and great atmosphere.

We verbleven voor de 2e keer op een Tasman park. Deze keer hadden we een economie cottage en deze was van alles voorzien.
De parken zijn echt geweldig.
We hadden wat problemen met de toaster en de vriezer die kapot waren. Ons ijs was hierdoor gesmolten, dus we hadden een melding gemaakt dat de vriezer en de toaster kapot waren. Binnen 15 minuten hadden we een nieuwe vriezer en een nieuwe toaster. We mochten ook nog eens gratis ijs komen pakken bij de receptie. Echt geweldig opgelost en een super service!

El camping está súper mantenido y todas las instalaciones están limpias (cocina, baños), es un lugar tranquilo y el personal es súper amable. Muy recomendado
El clima no dio para disfrutar la piscina, pero se veía que también estaba mantenida
Great place to holiday, it's a little far to walk to the beach or shop but is centrally located between shops and beach.

We stayed here in an economy cabin over the Easter weekend. Firstly I was stoked to find an accommodation option that didn’t charge min 4/5 days for the long weekend and appreciated TPHB allowed us to stay for the long weekend only. ||Our cabin sleeps 4, with a single bunk bed for kids and a queen size bed available. The cabin was very spacious and well kept. Ample cutlery and crockery for cooking with a stove and microwave. The shower was cosy-small but still good nonetheless. The only issue was our bathroom bin hadn’t been emptied from the previous guests.|The little verandah at the doorway was cute and overlooked the pool and kitchen area, only a short 15m walk, making a great cabin option for families where supervision of the kids can be maintained just from the verandah! ||Go for cabins 4-7 for pool access/views and cabins 7-11 for more privacy and quiet away from the pool area. We really liked how the cabins were separate from the van sites. ||Traffic in the park could flow both directions however was a little narrow and could be an issue with vans however we didn’t experience this issue. |There is no playground for kids which was a let down for us with younger kids, as the games area was usually occupied by older kids with attitudes. ||The service we received from booking confirmations to check-in and check out was friendly, down to earth and happy. ||Overall we enjoyed our stay, it was quiet given the Easter holidays and we didn’t hear any road traffic noise during our stay. I’d recommend this park to anyone seeking a quiet park and needing cabin accommodation.
We just stayed here for Easter and had a great stay. Clean amenities, tidy grounds, spacious sites and the staff were very friendly and welcoming. Thanks for having us and keep up the great work 👍

We loved our stay here. The games area and common room were great places for the kids to spread their wings. We enjoyed a bbq night in the shared area. Nice and quiet, family friendly and well looked after. Staff were super friendly too.
Great little park and small dog friendly accomodation as well, clean amenities and very friendly staff.

Our family of 5 had a beautiful stay at Hervey Bay and were pleasantly surprised how quiet and beautiful this park was. Staff were super friendly, and our little fur baby was treated to a little gift on arrival. Thank you to Max and Andrea for welcoming us for our first ever visit in Hervey Bay :)

Still scammers!!!

We stayed here in 2023. We booked the place via booking.com.
We received a payment link from tasman and payed it through that link. But we didn't know they also took our payment through booking.com.
It has been 2.5 years now. And we still didnt reveived our refund for our own money.
Over time we have sended them all the information they wanted from our account to see that they really didn't refund our own money.
Till this day, they didn't refund our money that they received by misleading us by sending us a text message with a link that we had to pay for our stay.

They also stopped replying after getting all the information they have asked for to prove we didn't received any refund.
Our question was and is. Send us the prove that you have refunded us on our creditcard. They are not replying anymore and they still have our money that they received by misleading.

So our question tasman holiday parks.
When will we get our 197 AUD back that we have payed double for our stay?
Bagni puliti, piazzole grandi e ben tenute. Personale gentile e prezzi onesti.
The Tasman holiday park is a beautiful part of the world to stay at.
Camping correct et bien situé. Mériterai un peu de rénovation, en tout cas dans notre cabine.

Central location in Harvey bay with clean amenities…nice quiet park great for families
Great camp kitchen and games room for the kids

Highly recommend this caravan park.  Close to the Esplanade and restaurants.  Has a pool.
The service is awesome and dog friendly too !!
Only here for one night, but excellent facilities. Great location for the esplanade - only 15 minute walk away. Wish we could have stayed there longer. Very clean and quality facilities.

Great little caravan park in Torquay QLD. Amenities were excepts and very clean.
The site had a lot of room.
Slippery floor in shower. Tiny tv is a joke. No coffee table.  Cheap toilet paper.  Very basic cabin.
Spent 2 nights in a lovely 2 bedroom cabin. Everything was clean and the kitchen had everything you would need. Very good value for money.

Filthy. Don't stay there! Don't stay at this park in a cabin!
Tip - To get the best out of your stay in Hervey Bay, choose your accommodation nearer the beach where you can go for a walk every day and see the sea every day.

Excellent great clean cabin fully self contained Excellent

Can I ask one small favour please don't use to much jiff cleaning it burnt the hell out of my eyes for at least 4 hours
Excellent value and very clean.Close to everything. Cabin great but needs something to hang clothes on.
The cabins are beautiful and clean. The pool looks great for you to relax in. I am very pleased we stayed here. Great, friendly staff there too.  Thank you.

This holiday park is the best in the area. It is quiet and off the main drag.  The managers (Pauline and Lindsay) are beyond amazing, very welcoming and have become like part of the family. The apprentice gardener Kerry is lovely. The park itself is so well kept, clean and tidy and has everything you need in a holiday destination. |The only thing that was a very small downfall was the Woolworths delivery trucks that were dropping off peoples groceries, they had no respect for the property and drove around terribly. |Overall we would highly recommend staying here and have already booked again for next Christmas, absolutely love this place and the staff that work there 😆.

Nice big rooms. We had a nice stay! The swimming pool looked good and the laundry space was also good.

Some people are living in their own standing caravan but we didn’t bother that. The only points to improve where that the electric gas pit to cook took so long to boil water and there weren’t clothespins. But we are backpacking so maybe we just are used to hostels! We liked the stay 😁
Great cabins nice and quiet not far from the water of Hervey Bay
The cabin's are very clean and we were really happy staying here. Pool, kid's area, BBQ, just a short drive to the main shopping.
I stayed here two nights in the cabin, was like a mini house with full size kitchen with oven/stove and fridge. Also had air conditioning in the main area. Close to shops and the esplanade.

Incredibly lovely lady at reception. She even kindly forgave us for a stupid damage which will be probably both expensive and time consuming to fix for them. Warm welcome, felt comfortable the whole time. Facilities were clean at any time. Showers are ginormous. Looks as if the park has been recently redone, the sites still look brand-new. Very calm, good place to relax.
Perfect location to sleep before and after the Fraser Island tour.
The cabin was comfortable, spacious & had everything we needed for our overnight stay.
Average is not really a place for a vacation

We had an excellent stay at Tasman Holiday Park in Hervey Bay. The value for money was outstanding, and everything was exceptionally clean. The camp kitchen was spotless and fully equipped with everything you might need—plenty of appliances, plus thoughtful extras like dish soap, sponges, and kitchen towels.

We were genuinely impressed. The park was quiet and peaceful, never overcrowded, which made for a very relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a clean, well-maintained, and tranquil camping experience.

For hervey bay this is good for longer stays.
It's not as expensive as most.
The toilet blocks are very clean. Good kitchen and it has a pool.

There are a couple more expensive caravan parks which are more resort like. But this is good value
Very noisy area.

We stayed on ensuite,powered site.
Quiet Park,not too far from major attractions. Friendly staff,clean and well maintained
This was the least value for money park during our 6 week trip. Expensive, small site, quite a distance to the beach, lots of permanents.

Dog friendly. Cabins are clean and spacious- the bathroom is a lot more outdated than the cabin but that was not a bother to us. It was raining so we did not access the pool area. Well equipped big outdoor kitchen area with a lot of seating and Smart TV. It has an air fryer, pans, pots, cutlery and utensils- 2 big industrial fridges if needed also. Staff was lovely we did late check in however my in laws got a dog goodie bag upon check in which was lovely. Easy check in and check out process. Would recommend.

We based ourselves here for a few days with our van while we explored the surrounding areas. |It’s nice and central and we enjoyed being minutes to the Esplanade and handy to shops etc. |While we were travelling down the coast this was our most expensive stay at $79 per night for a powered site. |The sites are small and access is pretty tight. By the time we were in and set up we had about 1.5 metres to a tent next door and about 1 metre to a camper trailer on the other side. |The amenities were ok and kept clean throughout our stay and there’s also a nice looking pool for swimming. However in the laundry two of the washing machines were ‘out of order’ with signs on them which was inconvenient for a number of us who were trying to catch up on some washing. |The road noise is pretty full on too and runs through the night.
Tidy rooms, good location
Using caravan for my accommodation, facilities are clean and the park is well serviced. Close to shopping, clubs and beach.
Nice place central to everything

One of the cleanest campsite bathrooms I’ve ever seen!
The facilities were spotless and very well maintained throughout our stay. You can really tell that cleanliness is a top priority here. Everything was regularly cleaned, fully stocked, and in excellent condition. It made our camping experience so much more comfortable. Highly recommended!
Ensuite site was clean and tidy.   Disappointing but was it backed onto  a main road which was very noisy.  Park itself is well maintained amd service friendly.  A shame about the road noise.

We booked a three day tour to K’Gari and we stayed the day before and the day after the tour in the Tasman caravan park. This was one of the nicest and cleanest caravan  parks we’ve been to on our road trip on the entire East Coast. We loved it here!

Absolutely Love this little gem. I was staying weekly as I set up my new business. I now stay monthly & it's my home away from home.  Staff are super friendly & accommodating. Rooms are always clean. They Have everything i need.
Really nice park well maintained

We booked a Superior 2 bedroom cabin for NYE with our family. We tried to call before arrival to see if we could have an earlier check in. No answer we tried about 10 times. We arrived at 1.30pm to check in. Upon arrival we were told that our cabin won't be ready until after 2pm as they are busy and running behind. They said they'd call us when ready. It got to 3.15 and no phone call, we have 3 kids and had just driven 3 hours. We were also so told that the pool facilities weren't working as someones child did a code brown the day before, she laughed as she told me this ... not really funny!!!
so you can imagine it's NYE in 30 degree heat, no check in yet and no pool facilities! We were told we could drive 15min away to use another facilities pool.. not ideal when you don't want to drive anymore during your stay! Finally at 3.30pm when we drove back to check in the cleaner was still in the room and told me the cabin was filthy from previous holiday maker and she was still behind. Not ideal. We finally got to check into our cabin (no 16).. well what a let down. It's nothing like the photos, the cabin is old run down, dirty, tiles.chipped cracked, stains on floor and carpet. It was nothing like the photos and to be honest false advertising. I went back and spoke to reception and they couldn't care less, they wanted out for the afternoon and told me the photos are just like that for advertising, totally false! So be warned and I'll attach photos the Superior cabins are just like the standard ones. The bunk beds are very dangerous for young children to get on and off the ladders. Don't waste your money, better value for money elsewhere! The park itself lacks any real holiday atmosphere and staff couldn't care less!
Very clean room.  Everything you need for a quick stay.
Great place. Clean and tidy with loads to do in the area. Would stay again for sure.

We booked a Superior 2 bedroom cabin for NYE with our family. |We tried to call before arrival to see if we could have an earlier check in. No answer we tried about 10 times. We arrived at 1.30pm to check in. Upon arrival we were told that our cabin won't be ready until after 2pm as they are busy and running behind. They said they'd call us when ready. It got to 3.15 and no phone call, we have 3 kids and had just driven 3 hours. We were also so told that the pool facilities weren't working... so you can imagine it's NYE in 30 degree heat, no check in yet and no pool facilities! We were told we could drive 15min away to use another facilities pool.. not ideal when you don't want to drive anymore during your stay! Finally at 3.30pm when we drove back to check in the cleaner was still in the room and told me the cabin was filthy from previous holiday maker and she was still behind. ||Not ideal. We finally got to check into our cabin (no 16).. well what a let down. It's nothing like the photos, the cabin is old run down, dirty, tiles.chipped cracked, stains on floor and carpet. It was nothing like the photos and to be honest false advertising. |I went back and spoke to reception and they couldn't care less, they wanted out for the afternoon and told me the photos are just like that for advertising, totally false! So be warned and I'll attach photos the Superior cabins are just like the standard ones. The bunk beds are very dangerous for young children to get on and off the ladders. Don't waste your money, better value for money elsewhere! The park itself lacks any real holiday atmosphere and staff couldn't care less!

Poor value, overpriced tiny cabin with basic fitout, beds that are not made up, non soundproof walls, and only one aircon for the entire cabin. For context, we paid $362 per night over the peak holiday season. It's probably worth $180 in reality - basically think basic cabin at caravan park, nothing more.

I wanted to stress that the two-bedroom cabin we stayed in was really really small, and the photos on the website and Booking.com looked a lot bigger, and considering the price we paid, I thought it was also meant to be bigger after seeing the photos online.

The only saving grace was really friendly service at check in. Although I'm not sure if I'm happy to pay $362 a night for a few minutes of encounter with a lovely staff. I am really dreading my second night stay tomorrow and wished I can cancel.

WATCH OUT!
(THEIR REACTION HERE ON GOOGLE REVIEW IS NOT TRUE. THEY DONT RESPOND VIA EMAIL AND ARE LYING IN THEIR REACTION. They didn't send the money back.)
THEY SCAMM AND CHARGE YOU TWICE ON YOUR CREDITCARD WHEN YOU BOOK VIA BOOKING.COM.

I have stayed here 2 nights with my husband for a whale trip.
They charged me twice for my stay.
1 time via booking.com and the 2nd they charged my creditcard themselves.
It has been 10 months, almost 11, that I am trying to get my money back. Booking tried to help. And they promised booking to send the double charged money back. They did not. Despite all the information they have asked me and I have send this to them. They are not sending my money back.

@Tasman Holiday Parks. When are you transferring my double charged money back to my account?
You say you are not scamming. This is scamming. Literally.
Charging our stay twice on my creditcard and not sending my money back.
LITERALLY

Beautiful park great location
Has nice cabins good size
Very clean
Pool and BBQ area
Great spot and good price

Grundsätzlich waren wir sehr zufrieden, mit unserer Cabin. Der Parkplatz war direkt vor dem Häuschen, es war sauber und die kleine Kochecke hatte mit Herdplatte, Toaster und Wassekocher alles, was zwei Personen benötigen. Der Essbereich und das Badezimmer waren klein, was aber nicht wirklich störte. Der WLAN-Empfang war jedoch in dem ausserhalb des Parks gelegenen Häuschen leider nicht gegeben.

To be clear, this review is of the Scarness Tasman Park.
I took an ensuite site, which unfortunately all are next to an extremely loud road. The ensuite itself was clean, except the roof is mouldy and the sink was blocked (which I fixed).
The park itself is nice and quiet, but the road noise is terrible. Maybe the people who said it is quiet here were deaf or had a site up the back? Maybe they had the wrong caravan park?

Myself and my children had 3 days here. It was very comfortable and clean. The units were modern and well equipped with everything you could want for a family holiday. It was a fantastic location as the beautiful esplanade was a short 5 minutes walk away.

Super clean ablutions, lovely well maintained sites, quiet and the staff really friendly and helpful. A lot of permanents but no problem at all. Good laundry, lots of washing lines, in close proximity to the shops and about a km to the esplanade/foreshore. Enjoyed our two week stay and felt sad to leave.
Above review pretty old. The new review now in Aug 2024 I complained about the barking dogs and the fact that there are no rules about the dogs in the park. I don't see this review posted. I had no major complaints about anything else

Third time staying at the Tasman, twice in a caravan and this time in a cabin. Everything was clean, the resort itself nicely maintained. The staff very friendly and helpful. The kitchen could have been better equipped... a couple of bowls for fruit salad and a green salad for instance. The old frying pan was replaced which was nice. A few coat hangers would have been useful. A bit far to walk to the beach and probably best to use the car for the supermarket. However, our time spent at the park was completely  spoiled by the dog in the caravan next to us who barked non stop at everyone that walked by. Still barking at 9pm. We spoke to the owner of the dog on arrival who said " nothing I can do if he barks at people walking by". This is not good enough as we all pay to have a peaceful holiday. In future we will look for caravan parks that don't have dogs or at least some rules about keeping dogs quiet.
Very good.
Park is super stil en zeer netjes. Sommige plekken zijn wel gelegen aan de doorgaande weg. Overdag hoor je dit wel maar ‘s nachts nietzo.

Average at best. We stayed in a cabin, the bed was terrible, too soft and sunk into the middle. Unable to block out all the outside lights at night when trying to sleep, alot of light came through the blinds. Bathroom old and required repairs. We won't be back.
Great place to stay , very quiet, staff friendly and helpful, amenities very clean .
Comfy bed, lovely gardens, good pool.

Deluxe Cabin was Filthy, switch hanging out of power point. Filthy couch stained and old food under cushions and sticky when sat on, holes in flooring, black mould in Bath room. TV didn't work and zero wifi. Huge stretch calling this Deluxe more like in need of Major Maintenance and Cleaning.

Clean park good beds … but the cabin 8 my sister and I shared was lacking in towel rails, was too high and wasn't big enough for 2 towels let alone for 4 people (which the cabin suppose to accommodate) it needs a shelf  to put our toiletries/make up on and a couple of hooks to hang clothes on while showering would be helpful. In the shower there was one small rack should be a bigger one. These are all basics for a cabin. We didn’t even shower in the cabin we both used the shower block facility as it had the hooks and a shelf which is what should be in the cabin!
Beautiful place to stay, clean, quiet, and wonderful amenities.  Super friendly staff and our little dog loved it too. Definitely coming back to stay again.  Thank you for your wonderful hospitality.
The rooms are very good but there is still improvements to be made which they are on to.  95% renovated so when completed they will be amazing.

I stayed in a deluxe cabin, it was very clean and updated. Check in took 2 minutes, and Bec was friendly and easy going. I had to extend my stay at extra night, Bec rearranged things to accommodate me.
It's about 10 minutes walk to Stocklands shopping centre
I would gladly stay here again.
Perfect!

We are travelling with our small dog and were really appreciative of this pet friendly park. The cabin we stayed in was lovely and cool after a long day of travelling. The only down side was a distinct dampness odour when entering the cabin which could be rectified with some essential oil. It was well equipped with most things we needed and the bed was comfortable. We enjoyed some relaxation time in the pool and it’s a nice walk to the beach front & shops.|We originally only booked one night but were offered a second night at a good rate so we took the offer.

Enjoyed our stay, clean rooms
However whenever we go away we always take our own pillows & pillowcases
So when we arrived placed our pillows on bed then supplied pillows in the wardrobe
We left before office opened only to get a call from the manager asking where the pillows where   Would have thought he would have checked before making a phone call to us on our way home
Just left as as assumed thieves!
Liked everything else about our stay except phone call from manager no apologies
When it was his mistake not checking wardrobe

Recently stayed here in a cabin and were very impressed. It has the best camp kitchen I've ever come across and literally everything you need from crockery and cutlery, fresh dish clothes, tea towels and every kitchen utensil possible. You could literally just bring food and not be disappointed. Kids enjoyed the pool and the laundry even had free powder! Some cabins even allow small dogs inside. Cabin was clean and never ran out of hot water.

This place is perfect, it's awesome for children, adult get aways, and pets 😊. Close to the beach and on the main road. 100% suggest this place for a weekend get away or a good holiday. Lovely hosts who will do anything to ensure your stay and service is beautiful 😍.
카라반 사이트에 텐트치고 5일 있었읍니다. 사이트당 촤대 6인 기준이었는데 카라반 이용할 경우에나 6명 가능할 것 같고 텐트로는 좁아서 힘들어요. 직원분들 모두 하나같이 친절하셔서 너무 좋았고 시설도 깨끗하게 잘 되어있었읍니다. 다만 개미가,, 부쉬캠핑 할 때보다 많았어요,,, 메인도로 바로 옆이라 밤새 차소리로 시끄러우니 참고하새오.

Booked in and paid 4 a wk in advance 4 a powered site only to get a phone call and hr b4 we arrived saying that they had a double booking and we're out of luck find somewhere else which I have never had happen anywhere else in my travels around Australia

We had a caravan.  Accommodated as requested next to other family with a camper trailer in the camping section.  The grounds were extremely clean, neat and tidy.  The bathrooms and toilets were always clean and well maintained.  Camp kitchen well stocked.  Large camp fridge available and a TV.  Saturday afternoon sausage sizzle in camp kitchen. Pool clean and tidy.  Everything was clean and tidy.  Staff friendly ++++.  Other family stayed in cabin.  Plenty of room and again clean and tidy.  1km walk to beach.  Or drive.  We stayed for Hervey Bay Tri series.  Staff allowed us to stay longer after the Sunday morning race and pack up later in the day.   Thank you.

Heerlijk rustige camping met vriendelijk ontvangst. Direct aan het strand en supermarkt en restaurants op loopafstand. Veel verschillende vogels en om 6 uur vliegen de vleermuizen uit die overdag in een boom op de camping slapen. Super plek
Nice clean park central to everything.
Nice clean cabins

Friendly greeting. Nice clean park. Lots of permanent people who keep their places immaculate. Plenty of toilets and showers. Dump point near the amenities. Nice and clean too. Pretty quiet too except for a local's yappy little dog ar 4:30am!

We had a wonderful experience at Tasman Holiday Park. Despite the pouring rain, we had a big room that accommodated us comfortably. The reasonable price and its convenient location close to everywhere made our stay even more enjoyable. Highly recommended for a memorable holiday.

Great park has lots of options from cabins to campsites to suit all needs. I had a powered site which was well maintained and clean. The park itself is clean and staff very friendly as well as good price. Quiet as well and but close to everything you need.

Great park in a good location which was very dog friendly. A park right next to it for the dog to go for a run. Walking distance to the beachfront and shops. Friendly staff and amenities were excellent.

I cannot recommend this Tasman holiday park enough. We love getting the pool cue/balls (small deposit needed). The pool is always refreshing. The rooms are well equipped, spacious and the beds are comfortable. This park is now our favourite place to stay in Hervey Bay.

A Member of the G'Day Parks Group. Have attended this park with our caravan on a couple of occasions. Pets allowed to sites only with conditions. Well maintained park, with friendly ground staff, and office staff. An excellent camp Kitchen, 2 BBQ"s etc, large seating area.||Highly recommended for packpackers, vanners, or family wishing to use the many cabins.
Fantastic bungalow and wonderful staff. Our home away from home.
Just a few little things in the room that made me take a star off but nothing major. We have stayed in the past with excellent results.
